'''Danny Ellison''' (born 16 December 1972) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a {{rlp|wg}} for [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]], [[Workington Town|Workington]], [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]] and [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]].

==Playing career==
Ellison made his début for [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]] in August 1993 against [[Hull F.C.]] After spending a season with [[Workington Town|Workington]], he returned to the first team in 1996, and went on to score a hat trick in Wigan's Premiership final victory against [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]]. In January 1998, he was sold to [[Castleford Tigers]].<ref>{{cite web|last1=Hadfield|first1=Dave|title=Rugby League: Ellison moves to Castleford from Wigan|url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/rugby-league-ellison-moves-to-castleford-from-wigan-1141246.html|website=The Independent|accessdate=3 June 2014|date=27 January 1998}}</ref>
